pi_items.source: Google Play Store search confirms com.sygic.aura is the official package name for Sygic GPS Navigation. Used in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh.
Matches the 'target_keys' list in verifier.py used to scan SharedPreferences XML files.
verifier.py checks if the XML value is 'true' (or string 'on' / '1') to verify the setting.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the real Sygic GPS Navigation Android app (com.sygic.aura). The verification script specifically looks for shared preference XML keys containing 'screen', 'display', 'awake', 'lock', or 'sleep' with a value of 'true', or it checks the system Window Manager / Power Manager for an active 'FLAG_KEEP_SCREEN_ON' or 'SCREEN_BRIGHT_WAKE_LOCK'.
